title: BABY RESOURCES - 211info
text: BUILDING HEALTHY FAMILIES BABY RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provide material goods such as baby diapers, wipes, formula, children clothing from new born to age 8. 207 NE Park Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Families Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-4pm Email (541) 426-9411 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 426-9411 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Baker County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm, Friday 8am-noon Services: Baby Clothing Children's Clothing Diapers Formula/Baby Food Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HARVEST SHARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTION PUBLIC SAFETY - CAR SEAT PROGRAM SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - MINI MOUNTAINEERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
